title: Google Finance Markets Scraper
description: Fetch Google Finance market overview, market movers, trend rows, and finance news.

index_market.title: Index Market
index_market.description: Regional filter for the indexes trend. Leave as Default unless Trend is indexes. Stale values from other trends are ignored.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Google Finance language code, such as en, de, es, or zh-cn.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code, such as us, gb, de, or ca.
